reviews.comment:
Un solo playero que atiende como si cobrará por hora y la gente espera q te espera . Dos cosas a la vez no pueden hacer

(Translated by Google)
One attendant working as if he were paid by the hour, and people are left waiting. They can't do two things at once.

reviews.comment:
Deberían poner más personal cuando se hacen colas de vehículos

(Translated by Google)
They should put more staff on hand when there are vehicle queues.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2poUGQxTXhhRFp4YTFoNWEwdFdhM05aY0ZOcFRsRRAB

reviews.comment:
Nunca entendí por qué el playero solamente cargaba nafta de a un auto. Una fila interminable pudiendo hacer el trabajo un poco más rápido.

(Translated by Google)
I never understood why the gas station attendant only filled one car at a time. An endless line when he could have done the job a little faster.
